Gemini Nexatech is a premier technology partner specializing in digital innovation, custom software development, and specialized engineering. We provide cutting-edge solutions across various industries including Technology, Manufacturing, Transportation, Energy, Construction, Aviation, and Oil & Gas.

# Services
- Software Consulting
- Custom Software Development
- Cloud DevOps
- Application Support
- AI Development
- Web Application Development
- Mobile App Development
- IoT
- API Integration
- Data Analytics Techniques

- TrackPro
- Tyre Sense 360
